name: p2p-chat-system
description: Peer-to-peer chat system with Node.js, Express, TCP sockets, Socket.IO, and MySQL.

scripts.peer:a: cross-env PEER_ID=peer-a USERNAME=Alice TCP_PORT=5101 WEB_PORT=3101 node src/peer/server.js
scripts.peer:b: cross-env PEER_ID=peer-b USERNAME=Bob TCP_PORT=5102 WEB_PORT=3102 node src/peer/server.js
scripts.peer:c: cross-env PEER_ID=peer-c USERNAME=Carol TCP_PORT=5103 WEB_PORT=3103 node src/peer/server.js
